### `{r} sR$headings$severe_infections_and_nec`

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeIntroductionTexts"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
include_localised("_tbl-intro-incidence-density.qmd")
```
:::

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| label: tbl-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: !expr 'sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$`tbl-cap`'
#| tbl-cap-location: top

check_outlier_interpretation <- FALSE

# Conditionally render table only if department data exists
if (!is.null(benchmark_data$incidence_density_rate_table) && 
    sum(benchmark_data$incidence_density_rate_table$n_own, na.rm = TRUE) > 0) {
  
  # Check if reference data columns exist
  has_reference <- "pooled_ref" %in% names(benchmark_data$incidence_density_rate_table)
  check_outlier_interpretation <- has_reference

  tbl <- benchmark_data$incidence_density_rate_table |>
    dplyr::select(-tidyselect::any_of("n_ref")) |>
    dplyr::rename(
      !!sR$table_headers$n := "n_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$rate := "pooled_own",
      !!sR$table_headers$pooled := tidyselect::any_of("pooled_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q1 := tidyselect::any_of("q1_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q2 := tidyselect::any_of("q2_ref"),
      !!sR$table_headers$q3 := tidyselect::any_of("q3_ref")
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      inf = dplyr::case_match(
        as.character(.data$inf),
        "si" ~ sR$si,
        "bsi" ~ sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc,
        "hap" ~ sR$pneumonia_sc,
        "nec" ~ sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc)) |>
    gt(rowname_col = "inf") |>
    sub_missing() |>
    gt::tab_options(
      latex.use_longtable = TRUE,
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = 13,
      footnotes.marks = "extended"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(
      columns = !sR$table_headers$n,
      decimals = 1,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2,
      locale = locale_gt) |>
    fmt_integer(
      columns = sR$table_headers$n,
      sep_mark = sR$digit_group_separator,
      min_sep_threshold = 2) |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$grp_si,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(c(
        sR$si,
        sR$primary_sepsis_bsi_sc,
        sR$pneumonia_sc)),
      id = "grp_si") |>
    tab_row_group(
      label = sR$other,
      rows = tidyselect::any_of(sR$necrotising_enterocolitis_sc),
      id = "grp_othr") |>
    row_group_order(groups = c("grp_si", "grp_othr")) |>
    tab_spanner(
      label = sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$incidence_density_rate,
      columns = tidyselect::any_of(
        c(
          sR$table_headers$rate,
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3)),
      id = "incidence_density_rate"
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = list(
        cells_column_spanners(),
        cells_column_labels(),
        cells_row_groups()
      )
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = md(
        paste0(
          "$$\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$incidence_density_rate,
          "} = \\frac{\\text{",
          sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$n_inf,
          "}}{\\text{",
          sR$patient_days,
          "}} \\times ",
          format_integer(1000),
          "$$"
        )),
      locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "incidence_density_rate")
    ) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$n_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$n),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$n)) |>
    tab_footnote(
      footnote = sprintf(
        sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$rate_footnote,
        sR$table_headers$rate),
      locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$rate))

  if ("ref" %in% benchmark_data$dataset_names) {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(40),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(10),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(10),
        sR$table_headers$pooled ~ pct(10),
        sR$table_headers$q1 ~ pct(10),
        sR$table_headers$q2 ~ pct(10),
        sR$table_headers$q3 ~ pct(10)
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$own_data_label,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$n,
          sR$table_headers$rate),
        id = "department_data"
      ) |>
      tab_spanner(
        label = sR$reference_data,
        columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$pooled,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3),
        id = "reference_data"
      ) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$pooled_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$pooled),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = sR$table_headers$pooled)) |>
      tab_footnote(
        footnote = sprintf(
          sR$`tbl-incidence-density-rates`$quartile_footnote,
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3,
          sprintf("%i%s", 25L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 50L, sR$percent_symbol),
          sprintf("%i%s", 75L, sR$percent_symbol)
        ),
        locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(
          sR$table_headers$q1,
          sR$table_headers$q2,
          sR$table_headers$q3))) |>
      tab_source_note(source_note = sR$pooled_rate_note)
  } else {
    tbl <- tbl |>
      cols_width(
        stub() ~ pct(60),
        sR$table_headers$n ~ pct(20),
        sR$table_headers$rate ~ pct(20)
      )
  }

  tbl
} else {
  no_data_table()
}
```

::: {.content-visible when-meta="includeOutlierInterpretation"}
```{r}
#| output: asis
if (check_outlier_interpretation) {
  outliers <- detect_outliers(benchmark_data$incidence_density_rate_table)
  if (length(outliers$below_q1) > 0 || length(outliers$above_q3) > 0) {
    grouped <- group_outliers(outliers, "incidence_density_rate_table")
    outlier_text <- format_outlier_text(grouped, sR)
    if (nchar(outlier_text) > 0) {
      cat("\n\n::: {.callout-tip}\n")
      cat("## ", sR$outlier$heading, "\n\n")
      cat(outlier_text, "\n")
      cat(":::\n")
    }
  }
}
```
:::
